feed.title: App Store Discounts（US）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:49753370488353792+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008699750812672+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2086 201 1885 98
US 1935 176 1759 80

View All Apps

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(US)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Skel and Defense
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → $0.49 [$0.49 ~ $1.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.49

In-App Purchases

  • Blessing of Experience：$1.99
  • Skin Ticket x3：$0.99
  • Skin Ticket x8：$2.99
  • Skin Ticket x1：$0.29

Application Description

◆ Dive into the ultimate dungeon defense experience with 'Skel&Defense! ◆ ◆ Command Your Dungeon, Defend Your Territory! Ever dreamed of being the mastermind behind a formidable dungeon? Now's your chance! Strategically fend off relentless waves of heroes by day and unleash your devious trap layouts by night. It's your dungeon, your rules! ◆Unleash Chaos with a Variety of Traps! With a whopping 26 trap rooms at your disposal, the possibilities are endless! From fiery infernos to icy spikes, poison darts, and electrifying shockwaves, craft the ultimate labyrinth of doom to thwart intruders! ◆ Transform and Conquer with Skel Warriors! Not content with just traps? Harness the power of Skel warriors! Command mage skels, stealthy rogue skels, and stalwart shield skels to turn the tide of battle in your favor! ◆ Conquer Challenging Stages and Endless Mode! Embark on an epic journey through five challenging stages, each with its own unique rewards! Then, test your limits in endless mode, where every wave is a new challenge waiting to be conquered! ◆ Customize Your Experience with Perks! Before each stage, choose from a variety of perks to tailor your gameplay experience! With over 20 unique perks to discover, every playthrough offers something new! ◆ Enhance Your Skills and Uncover Secrets! Clear waves, earn attribute points, and unlock powerful enhancements! Dive into the comprehensive encyclopedia to uncover hidden secrets and unlock new rooms, synergies, and artifacts! ◆ Value-Packed Gaming Guaranteed! We're committed to delivering top-notch entertainment at an unbeatable price! Try it risk-free, and if it doesn't suit your taste, simply request a refund. Your satisfaction is our priority! Don't miss out on the adventure – download 'Skel&Defense' now and become the ultimate dungeon master!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 7Days : Backer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $0.49 [$0.49 ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.49

Application Description

Are you bored of the same old novels? Are you interested in interactive story games, visual novel, choice based storyline, and indie games, but you're tired of the same old? Try our Adventure Game, a Mysterious Novel where choices do matter! We are offering our interactive storytelling game named ‘7Days: Mystery Visual Novel, Adventure Game’. All our stories, mysterious novels are written by diligently selected authors. Here we come a story game, filled with mystery, touching, innocent episodes, storyline and chat stories! '7Days!: Mystery Visual Novel, Adventure Game' is an amazing mystery story game and choice based game. It is a unique choice based, storytelling game where the user can create their unique story based on the choices they make. We will provide the best story game experience with a great mystery storyline via the chat based adventure game, designed to suit mobile devices. It is a strongly recommended game for you. ■ Game explained Every choice you make will change your story. Every small choice will change your relationships with comrades, and change your fate and those of your comrades at critical moments. You may be the villain, or a trustworthy comrade. Everything depends on your choices. ■ Mystery Storyline There are dead spirits who have been put to test for resurrection in the world of death. The messenger of death has assigned them each with a task and they must either attack one another or work together. Your character, Kirell, must also complete the choice-based tasks that she has been assigned. But her tasks requires others to die.... You only have 7 days What choice will you make? Experience this imagination-provoking story right now. ■ '7Days: Mystery Visual Novel, Adventure Game' features - Graphic Novel style artwork with stunning graphics - Unique game setting that switches between life and death - Mystery storyline that changes according to your choices - Various achievements and hidden challenges - Different episodes and endings based on the story - Text adventure with a mysterious feeling - Exciting storytelling game - Choice based game in mystery ■ We recommend this Adventure Game, Story Game for… - Who Like Visual Novel, Mystery Games, Adventure Game or Story Games, Opus, Innocent - Want to kill time while playing Adventure Games or reading a Visual Novel - Love to be in World of Ghosts, or like to play Mystery Games, Interactive Storyline - Love light novels, Masterpiece Storyline, Mysterious Novel or Adventure Games - Those who want to move from the old stories & old templates of adventure game - Love interactive mystery story, Masterpiece Novel, Storytelling game - Those who get tired of playing regular novel story - Who Like Adventure Games | Best Storytelling | Mystery Storyline | Thriller Storyline | Innocent Storyline | Indie Games ■ We guarantee that it'll be fun. Download and experience it right now We bring new adventure game storyline! Now, you have the opportunity to enjoy our Thriller, Mystery Story Adventure Games! If you see any issues or have good suggestions, please send them to help@buffstudio.com. We will work hard make better Choice based story games, Mystery storytelling, Indie games, Thriller storyline, Adventure games, Choice based game. ■ We need your support to make better story games, adventure games, visual novel games. Please recommend this storytelling game to your family and friends. It will be of great help to us.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Raiders Map
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Raider Mk. 2：$17.99 → $5.99 [$5.99 ~ $17.99]
  • Raider Mk. 3：$29.99 → $9.99 [$9.99 ~ $29.99]
  • Raider Mk. 1：$4.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $4.99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Raider Mk. 2：$5.99
  • Raider Mk. 3：$9.99
  • Raider Mk. 1：$0.99
  • Raider Weekly：$1.99

Application Description

All in one app for an Interactive Map, Loot locations, Material list and breakdown list, Enemy drop list, guides and quest-line guides. - Interactive Maps - Sort and Filter - Event Timers and Notifications - Guides for Quests Guides and Maps are partially available for free, but a Pro membership is required to access all content Raiders Map is the best tool for easy access to everything, along with world class support. You can reach me directly on X for help or to report any issues: All4nDev, or through discord. Not affiliated with embark. Raiders Map is independently owned and managed. apple standard EULA https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

entry.title: Speech to Text : Voice to Text
entry.id: Speech to Text : Voice to Text-us-1782185577372
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → Free [Free ~ $1.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Month：$1.99
  • Year：$11.99
  • 6 Months：$4.99

Application Description

Speech to text : Voice to text is the powerful, real-time dictation solution. Based on the latest artificial intelligence and using a powerful speech recognition engine, This Dictation app accurately transcribes your speech to text in real time. The clean elegant design, along with the non-stop voice recognition and other features means you can relax and focus on your thoughts and content. Using our app , your words will be magically transcribed into text without your ever needing to touch a keyboard. Now you can use the power of your voice to create your words! Easily share your text and files later! (Works with Evernote, Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive, Facebook, Twitter, Snapchat, WhatsApp and other iOS supported sharing apps.) Whether you’re a professional writer, doctor, lawyer, disabled or somehow prevented from traditional typing, Speech to text : Voice to text app will swiftly solve your transcription problems and help you achieve your writing goals today! This fantastic speech-to-text app will allow you to do more with your iPhone/ iPad : ・Longer Record time: -DICTATE CONTINUOUSLY up-to 1 HOUR. ・Unlimited save & edits ・Transcribed text can be edited directly. ・Ideal for both individual and group transcription ・Background support for voice recognition. ・On-device Speech Recognition. • Voice recognition support for 59 languages and accents. • Share your text on social networks. • Copy your text to other apps. • Send your text as an email or text message. • Create PDF instantly with single click. • Convert text your notes, reports, letters into PDF instantly • Text Analysis using AI. ► Currently Supported Speech Recognition Languages: Arabic, Cantonese, Catalan, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Malay, Norwegian, Bokmål, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Shanghainese, Slovak, Spanish, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese. Technology: New iOS 14 Speech framework having state of the art accuracy, Faster ,Automatically adapts to the user Super easy: Simply click the microphone and start dictating. No need to login or register You can add new paragraphs, punctuation marks, smileys and other special characters using simple voice commands. Who Should Use Speech to Text : Voice to Text ? 1. Reporters: Interviews, conversations and more are easily recorded and transcribed, preserving the original audio. 2. Writers: Novelists, Authors, can all write in their true voice, capturing their moments of inspiration anytime, anywhere. 3. Professionals: Doctors, lawyers, managers, etc. Easily transcribe your daily tasks, notes, conference calls, letters and more! Your voice makes it happen! 4. Elderly or Disabled: Eliminates slow typing, commonly misspelled words or embarrassing composition mistakes. This app makes it convenient and easy to send and share your words with those you love. 5. Language Students: Text analysis using AI , Easily learn and master new words and languages by practicing dictation with speech to text app ! SUBSCRIPTION PRICING & TERMS We offer three auto-renewing subscription options: $1.99 / month $9.49 / 6 months - Save 20% $14.49 / 1 year - Save 40% The price corresponds to the same price segment , which are set in the “Apple App Store Matrix” for other currencies You can cancel a subscription anytime by turning off auto renewal though your iTunes account settings.This must be done 24 hours before the end of subscription period to avoid being charged. The cancellation will take effect the day after the last day of the current subscription. Terms of Service : https://voiceovermaker.com/termsofuse Privacy Policy: https://voiceovermaker.com/privacypolicy Support: Please email for any suggestions/feedback voiceovermakerz@gmail.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Dash for Tesla
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$5.19 → $4.19 [$2.99 ~ $5.19]）

All Price Information

Price：$4.19

Application Description

Dash for Tesla is a Bluetooth‑based digital dashboard designed for Tesla owners. No login, no cloud authorization, and no additional hardware box are required. With just your phone and Bluetooth, you can access vehicle speed and other officially supported data and display them in multiple dashboard styles. Core Highlights No login · No cloud auth · No extra box You don’t need to enter your Tesla account, request remote API tokens, or install any OBD/communication box. As long as your vehicle supports Bluetooth key capabilities, you can connect locally and display data. Local Bluetooth connection Uses the vehicle’s officially supported Bluetooth capabilities to connect locally and show basic information such as speed and selected vehicle status on your phone. Dashboard‑first experience The core of the app is a digital cluster: it focuses on key driving information like speed, so you can read what matters at a glance. Multiple themes and backgrounds Choose from different dashboard backgrounds and color themes to match your personal style and interior mood. Local‑first, fast response Communication is local over BLE, not dependent on cloud connectivity, which means faster response and better stability even in poor or no network conditions. Privacy & Security No account registration is required, and we do not build a cloud profile based on your personal identity. Vehicle data is primarily processed locally on your device rather than stored long‑term on our own servers. Permissions such as Bluetooth and Location are used only to enable local communication with the vehicle and to support dashboard features. Ideal for drivers who Want a simple, focused digital speedometer and status dashboard. Prefer not to share Tesla account credentials or rely on cloud‑based remote control. Don’t want to install extra hardware boxes and just use the phone plus the vehicle itself. Important Notice Dash for Tesla is an independent third‑party tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected to Tesla, Inc. or any of its subsidiaries. The app only displays data based on the vehicle’s officially supported Bluetooth capabilities and does not perform any modification or flashing of the vehicle. All Tesla‑related trademarks and brand names are the property of their respective owners and are used only for descriptive purposes.

entry.title: This Aint Even Poker, Ya Joker
entry.id: This Aint Even Poker, Ya Joker-us-1782101576613
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$2.99 → $2.49 [$2.49 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$2.49

Application Description

Welcome to This Ain’t Even Poker, Ya Joker - a unique incremental idle clicker where you flip cards to earn money, grow your hand, buy new decks, unlock powerful upgrades, discover new cards, and more. Can you defeat the Jester and escape the carnival? Steam: Very Positive, 89% GROW YOUR HAND Buy new cards to increase your odds of hitting good hands. If you're rich enough, you can even break the rules and get over 5 cards. ESTABLISH DOMINANCE Even though the Jester doesn't like it, you can buy new decks of cards in order to play more hands at once. Use this to your advantage to grow those numbers even faster! GET UPGRADED Buy powerful upgrades using your hard earned coins, enabling you to progress quicker, open up new avenues, and take on the evil Jester! GO ON EXPEDITIONS Once unlocked, you can send your minions on expeditions to discover new otherworldy cards with powerful benefits. Upgrade these missions to provide even more powerful benefits as you progress. You can even unlock missions to destroy cards from your deck that you don't want, to ensure every hand is exactly how you want it. ASCEND TO GREATNESS Make a deal with the Jester to start over in exchange for Poker Chips (poker chips? But this ain't even poker...?), use those chips to buy even more powerful upgrades. ESCAPE THE HOUSE OF CARDS You're trapped in the Jester's domain, can you manage to defeat him and escape? Or will he keep you there, trapped forever in an endless cycle?

entry.title: Descenders
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$9.99 → $8.99 [$8.99 ~ $9.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$8.99

Application Description

Descenders is extreme downhill freeriding for the modern era, with procedurally generated worlds, and where mistakes have real consequences. Will you lead your team to glory and become the next legendary Descender? • Procedurally generated worlds: Take on different jumps, slopes and hillbombs every time you play • Freestyle bike controls: Control every subtle movement of your rider, with an in-depth physics system made for slick whips and scrubs • Risk vs reward: Push your rider for massive scores and combos -- but bail too many times and you might lose it all • Build your Rep: A fully-featured online Rep system lets you show off your worth, and earn new bikes and threads • Become the next Descender: Can you survive the game in a single run, and reach the ranks of the legendary Descenders? Pick a Team, Become a Legend In Descenders, your team is your life. When you pick a side -- Enemy, Arboreal or Kinetic -- you'll be bound together with other players who choose the same side as you. Grab your bike, pick your team, and attempt to live up to the legend of your Descender. Will you join the die-hard, trick-frenzy ranks of Team Enemy, the proficient, off-road stylings of Team Arboreal, or the high-octane, speed-is-everything Team Kinetic? • Wear your team's colors and apparel with pride, and receive exclusive team gear • Your Rep points go towards your team's total Rep, and exclusive prizes are awarded to the top team • Gain access to your team's exclusive channel on the Descenders Discord server

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: EvoCreo2: Monster Trainer RPG
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → Free [Free ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Tamer Kit：$0.99
  • Master Package：$19.99
  • Prime Gemma 500：$4.99
  • Starter Package：$2.99
  • Prime Gemma 1200：$9.99
  • Prime Gemma 2500：$19.99
  • Hunter Package：$9.99
  • Prime gemma 100：$0.99
  • Evoker Kit：$0.99
  • Prime Dimension DLC：$6.99

Application Description

Join millions of players in this pocket monster game sequel Embark on an epic adventure in EvoCreo 2, the ultimate monster-catching RPG set in the captivating world of Shoru. Immerse yourself in a land teeming with mythical creatures called Creo. For thousands of years, these collectible monsters have roamed the lands, their origins and evolution shrouded in mystery. Do you have what it takes to unravel the secrets of the Creo and become a legendary Evoking Master Trainer? Uncover a Compelling Adventure Game Begin your role playing game (RPG) journey as a new recruit in the Shoru Police Academy. Creo Monsters are disappearing, and it's your mission to uncover the truth behind these mysterious events. But there's more to the story than meets the eye in this monster game — dark plots are brewing, and your skills will be put to the test. Along the way, assist the citizens of Shoru by completing over 50 engaging missions, building alliances, and discovering hidden treasures. Capture and Train Over 300 Monsters Love monster-collecting games? Build your RPG dream team of Creo in this open-world role playing game. Hunt rare and legendary monsters, each available in unique alternate colors. With over 300 unique monsters to capture, evolve, and train, you’ll have endless possibilities to customize your strategy in pocket monster games. Create powerful combinations and lead your Creo to victory in thrilling turn-based battles. Explore this monster adventure game Experience more than 30 hours of offline and online rpg gameplay as you dive into a richly detailed open world. From dense forests to mysterious caves and bustling towns, the continent of Shoru is filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered. Adventure through diverse environments, complete challenging quests, and uncover hidden paths to legendary treasures. Explore 2 more biomes in this sequel like the desert and find many monsters on the way of your adventure. Master a deep and strategic RPG battle system as a monster trainer & hunter Prepare for trainer battles with a highly customizable system. Equip your Creo with items and unlock over 100 unique traits to enhance their abilities. Train your Creo to learn and master over 200 moves, which you can swap anytime to adapt to new challenges. Face fierce opponents, manage elemental weaknesses, and use your tactical skills to gain the upper hand. Can you become a pocket monster master trainer? Prove Yourself as the Ultimate Master Trainer Challenge the strongest monster trainers across Shoru and rise through the ranks in this paid role playing game. Compete in the prestigious Coliseum, where only the best monster trainers are crowned as champions. Will you conquer every rpg battle and claim the title of Evoking Master Trainer? Key Features: - Sequel of one of the top paid role playing games worldwide - 300+ collectible monsters to capture, train, and evolve. - No level cap on your monsters - engaging endgame! - A sprawling open world with 30+ hours of offline & online gameplay. - Engaging turn-based battles with deep strategy elements. - Hundreds of moves and traits to customize your Creo. - Over 50 missions packed with adventure and rewards. - Offline play—no internet required to enjoy the game. - Stunning pixel art visuals reminiscent of classic monster RPGs. Why Players Love EvoCreo 2: Fans of Monster-Catching games and monster trainer RPGs will feel right at home. A perfect mix of creature collection, exploration, and battle strategy. Casual and hardcore gamers alike will enjoy the mix of action and adventure. Join the adventure today and start your journey toward becoming the ultimate monster trainer in EvoCreo 2! Can you catch them all and master the secrets of the Creo?

entry.title: Auto Redial App
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Weekly Subscription：$1.49 → $0.99 [$0.69 ~ $2.99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Weekly Subscription：$0.99
  • Premium Lifetime：$7.99
  • Yearly Subscription：$5.99
  • Pro – Lifetime：$0.00

Application Description

With this application, you can make automatic calls to the numbers you want efficiently and in a personalized way. You can define the number of repetitions, the interval between calls, add an extension, activate vibration before dialing, and even schedule your calls using a built-in calendar. Auto Redial App also offers a simple and intuitive interface, detailed call history, and multiple customization options to fit your needs. This application is ideal for anyone who needs to make repetitive calls automatically — such as an appointment call, a busy call retry, or contacting services where the line is busy. Main Features: - Automatically redial busy or unanswered calls. - Set number of retries and time intervals. - Schedule calls in advance via calendar. - Add extensions automatically after dialing. - Enable vibration before each redial. - Call history and retry stats. Perfect for: - Booking appointments (doctors, embassies, etc.) - Customer service or tech support - Calling public offices - Freelancers and business owners following up clients Whether you’re calling to book a doctor’s appointment, reach customer service, or just trying to connect when the line is busy, this app saves time and frustration. Privacy Policy: https://sites.google.com/view/auto-redial-app-rellamadas/pol%C3%ADtica-de-privacidad?pli=1 Terms of Use (EULA): Apple App Store https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: This War of Mine
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$13.99 → $1.99 [$0.99 ~ $13.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

In-App Purchases

  • The Little Ones：$1.99

Application Description

"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK "This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps "I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer In This War Of Mine you do not play as an elite soldier, rather a group of civilians trying to survive in a besieged city; struggling with lack of food, medicine and constant danger from snipers and hostile scavengers. The game provides an experience of war seen from an entirely new angle. The pace of This War of Mine is imposed by the day and night cycle. During the day snipers outside stop you from leaving your refuge, so you need to focus on maintaining your hideout: crafting, trading and taking care of your survivors. At night, take one of your civilians on a mission to scavenge through a set of unique locations for items that will help you stay alive. Make life-and-death decisions driven by your conscience. Try to protect everybody from your shelter or sacrifice some of them for longer-term survival. During war, there are no good or bad decisions; there is only survival. The sooner you realize that, the better. This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition It's been two years since This War of Mine global release and we're still expanding the experience. This new free DLC, created especially for the Anniversary Edition, adds new characters, new locations to explore, and most importantly - a whole new ending, leading to a different outcome to the game. The dilemma though remains the same – how far will you go, to protect the ones you care about? Key Features: • Inspired by real-life events • Control your survivors and manage your shelter • Craft weapons, alcohol, beds or stoves – anything that helps you survive • Make decisions - an often unforgiving and emotionally difficult experience • Randomized world and characters every time you start a new game • Charcoal-stylized aesthetics to complement the game's theme This War of Mine experience is now broadened with "The Little Ones" expansion. "The Little Ones" explores the hardships of wartime survival as seen from an entirely new perspective―that of a child. This DLC puts you in charge of a group of adults and children stuck in a besieged city, struggling with basic necessities. TWoM: The Little Ones focuses not only on the reality of enduring war, but also on how even in times of conflict, kids are still kids: they laugh, cry, play, and see the world differently. In addition to thinking about survival, you'll have to summon your inner child to understand how to protect the little ones. Their youth, and their future, are in your hands. • Experience the biggest expansion to This War of Mine • Protect innocent children • Craft toys, play with kids, and be the caretaker they need • Meet new adult civilians in scenarios with children PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Leek Inc. 2
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Leek VIP：$6.99 → $4.99 [$1.99 ~ $6.99]

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

In-App Purchases

  • Leek VIP：$4.99
  • Leek Goldcoin +10000：$9.99
  • Leek Goldcoin +100：$0.99
  • Treasure Chest Master：$2.99
  • Leek Goldcoin +10：$0.99
  • Leek Goldcoin +1000：$3.99

Application Description

Leek Investment Company 2 is finally here, a new capital frenzy waiting for you to open! 1.New beautiful pixel graphics, up to 100 kinds of buildings, more than 200 kinds of icons; 2.Create value for the company, get promotion opportunities and a lot of commissions; acquire shares of the company and become the president of the company; 3.Real trading system (100x leveraged trading), up to thousands of random events, to make huge profits in the ever-changing market; 4.Awesome BTC mining system, simulating the BTC arithmetic system, hoarding a large number of mining machines to become a super miner; 5.Recruit talent to work for you and get double the results depending on the employee's occupation and talent; 6.Enter the leek club, get acquainted with industry elites and the world's richest people, and build your own business empire; 7.ICO/IPO system; 8.Extra large city map, city buildings can be acquired or upgraded; 9.Built-in multiple arithmetic games or DAPP; 10.Private garage, luxury car collection...

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: 生辰 — 桌面时间小组件
entry.id: 生辰 — 桌面时间小组件-us-1782101576613
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • 永久会员：$14.99 → $12.99 [$12.99 ~ $19.99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 生辰-年度会员：$12.99
  • 月度会员：$1.99
  • 生辰年度会员：$9.99
  • 永久会员：$12.99
  • 生辰-季度会员：$12.99

Application Description

这是一款关于生、死、心愿与延续的App。 小时候，我以为自己是不会老去的彼得·潘，却终究敌不过健康磨损，容颜老去。 时针转动，生命流逝，但每一次心跳都可以更加有力。 有时候，生命只是一连串的数字，多少年，多少月，多少小时，多少分钟。当你意识到这个时，往往陷入巨大的虚无感之中，惶恐不能自拔。 而现在，这些数字可以成为你重塑生命的坐标，指引你走向更健康、更长久的未来。 生辰 2.0 通过 AI 分析和科学判断，不仅预测生命的终点，更为你铺就延长生命的道路： - 探索你的生命时钟：了解当下的预期寿命，直面生命的有限与珍贵。 - 发现延寿的可能：看见改变健康习惯能为你带来多少额外的生命时光。 - 聚合健康数据：自动追踪睡眠、锻炼、压力（HRV）、经期、喝水等十余种健康数据 美国诗人纳·斯待尔在87岁那年写道： "如果我能够从头活过，我会试着犯更多的错。 我会放松一点，我会灵活一点。 我会爬更多的山，游更多的河，看更多的日落。" 因为了解生命的终点，才能更好地珍惜当下的每一刻。生辰2.0 探索健康的可能，让我们成为你健康旅程的长久伙伴。 【生辰 App 会员服务说明】 1.会员包含几种订购类型 订阅周期：1个月、3个月、12个月 2.首次订购后会通过iTunes账户直接支付；账户会在到期前24小时内扣费，扣费成功后自动顺延一个订阅周期 3.本服务由您自主选择是否续订，如需取消，请在订阅到期24小时前，在 AppleID 设置中取消 4.生辰App 会员协议 生辰App 会员服务协议：https://post.jellow.club/whatslife-payment/ 5.生辰App 软件协议与隐私政策 生辰 软件许可及服务协议：https://post.jellow.club/whatslife-agreement/ 生辰 隐私协议：https://post.jellow.club/whatslife-privacy/

entry.title: Mini Landlord - Watch Game
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → Free [Free ~ $0.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Full Game Unlock：$0.99
  • Luxury Pack：$1.49
  • Medium Pack：$0.99

Application Description

From the creators of "Mini Billiards," comes a classic Doudizhu (Landlord Poker) game exclusively designed for Apple Watch! Experience smart AI opponents, 3 difficulty levels, and immersive haptic feedback. No internet needed. No iPhone needed. Just lift your wrist and play anytime, anywhere! Game Features: • Premium Offline Experience: One-time purchase, no ads, no data usage. Play on the subway, on a plane, or anywhere without signal. • 3 Difficulty Levels: Easy Mode: Newbie friendly with great starting hands. Pure stress relief. Medium Mode: Classic strategy. Win with your skills. Hard Mode: High Rollers! High stakes, high rewards. Heart-pounding action! • Emergency Aid System: Ran out of beans? Don't worry! The system provides free "Emergency Aid" beans to help you make a comeback. The fun never stops! • Customizable Skins: Use your winnings to unlock premium table themes. • Immersive Haptics: Large button layout optimized for the watch face, combined with Taptic Engine feedback for a satisfying gaming feel. • Watch Face Complication: Add to your watch face for one-tap instant access. No waiting. ‌How to Play:‌ • Tap Cards: Tap to select cards (cards will float up); tap again to deselect. • Play Cards: Tap the play button. The smart system auto-detects card patterns and prevents invalid moves. • Bid for Landlord: Choose to bid 1-3 points based on your hand strength. • Long Press to Quit: Perfect for a quick break! Long press the screen for 1 second to instantly exit the game and return to the watch face. • Winning: The Landlord wins by playing all cards first. Farmers win if either teammate plays all cards first.

entry.title: Flying Carpet File Transfer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → Free [Free ~ $0.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Direct file transfer between iOS, Android, Linux, and Windows with no wireless network or internet connection required: just two devices in close range using ad hoc WiFi (and optionally Bluetooth). Other versions available for free at https://flyingcarpet.spiegl.dev.

Application Screenshot

iPad
